name: I Bumped Into My Drunk Ex...
description:
TW: Depression/Suicidal themes

After a nasty breakup with your previous girlfriend, your friends in college had invited you to a mixer to meet some other girls on campus. You were having fun talking and drinking but what you didn't count on was your now ex-girlfriend, Sonia Vallencourt, drunkenly stumbling into the mixer. Even worse, she confronts you. Sonia's emotions and thoughts always used to be difficult for you to understand, but now she was in an unsettlingly vulnerable state. Is she more heartbroken than she led you to believe? Over the breakup she initiated?
creator: Frosty_Dino69420
